title: 15 Must-Follow AI Accounts on X (Twitter) for Cutting-Edge Insights
summary: A curated list of top AI influencers and researchers to follow on X (Twitter) for the latest trends, research, and debates. These accounts offer unique perspectives from leading figures in the field.
body:
A recent tweet by @FourVork (Praetor) highlighted 15 essential AI-related accounts to follow on X (Twitter). The list includes prominent figures like @karpathy, known for his insightful tweets that often shape the narrative around large language models (LLMs), and @fchollet, the creator of Keras and a key researcher in artificial general intelligence (AGI). These accounts are praised for their thoughtful contributions to the AI community.


Following these accounts provides a direct line to the latest advancements, research, and debates in AI. For instance, @karpathy's tweets often foreshadow trends that later become mainstream, while @fchollet offers deep dives into the limitations and benchmarks of AI systems. These insights are invaluable for anyone looking to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving field of AI.


The list is just a starting point. The AI community on X is vast and dynamic, with new voices emerging regularly. As the field continues to grow, these accounts will likely remain influential, but keeping an eye out for rising stars and niche experts can also provide unique perspectives. The conversation around AI is ongoing, and these accounts are at the forefront.
twitterThread:
🚀 The 15 AI accounts you NEED to follow on X (Twitter) to stay ahead of the curve. 

Thread:

1. @karpathy 
His tweets already create LLM narratives that you later see on LinkedIn in 2 months. 

2. @fchollet 
Posts thoughtful research on intelligence, benchmarks, and AI limitations. Keras creator + ARC-AGI

Here's why this matters: These accounts shape the AI conversation. 

3. @ylecun 
One of the godfathers of deep learning. His insights are gold.

The wild part: Many of these accounts predict trends before they hit mainstream media. 

4. @gdb 
Gary Marcus. Cognitive scientist. Always challenging the status quo.

This changes everything for anyone trying to stay updated in AI. 

5. @ylecun 
His work on backpropagation is foundational. 

Full list in thread.
